messages: The project is organized as a Rust-based messaging bridge service with a modular structure where `crates/` holds the core Rust microservices (clawd, telegramd, whatsappd, etc.), `configs/`, `data/`, and `migrations/` store configuration and persistence data, `docker/` and `scripts/` provide deployment and operational tooling, `external_skills/`, `prompts/`, and `skill_develop/` manage AI agent capabilities, while `UI/`, `plans/`, `docs/`, and `document/` contain the frontend interface, roadmaps, and documentation.
result_json.text: The project is organized as a Rust-based messaging bridge service with a modular structure where `crates/` holds the core Rust microservices (clawd, telegramd, whatsappd, etc.), `configs/`, `data/`, and `migrations/` store configuration and persistence data, `docker/` and `scripts/` provide deployment and operational tooling, `external_skills/`, `prompts/`, and `skill_develop/` manage AI agent capabilities, while `UI/`, `plans/`, `docs/`, and `document/` contain the frontend interface, roadmaps, and documentation.
